summary:
## 85 improvements landed in the last 100 days 🎉

It's been a busy stretch for Handy, the free, open-source app that turns your speech into text. Dozens of contributors from around the world pitched in, and the focus was clear: **stop losing people's recordings, work reliably on every operating system, and speak more languages.** Here's the plain-English rundown.

### ✨ What's new

- **Three new languages.** Handy now speaks **Hebrew** (with full right-to-left support), **Bulgarian**, and **Swedish**.
- **More AI cleanup options.** You can now connect Handy to **Cohere** and **Amazon's AI service** to polish your transcripts, and local AI now responds faster by skipping its slow "thinking" step.
- **Teach Handy your words.** Add custom words so tricky names and terms get spelled the way you mean, and filler words like "um" are only stripped out in languages where they're actually filler.
- **Handier everyday touches.** Switch transcription models straight from the menu-bar icon, pick between processor or graphics-card acceleration, and turn on a **portable install on Windows** that keeps everything in one folder.

### 🔧 Things we fixed

- **Your recordings are safe now.** Audio is saved **before** it's transcribed, so a hiccup mid-process no longer loses your words, and you can retry from your history.
- **No more stuck downloads.** A long-standing bug that trapped some users in an endless, corrupted-download loop is gone.
- **Fewer crashes.** Fixed a crash on older computers, stopped the app from crashing when a microphone is blocked, and made it shut down gracefully instead of vanishing.
- **Nothing gets clipped.** Added a recording buffer and stopped audio from being dropped, so the start and end of what you say are captured.
- **Clearer when something's wrong.** Handy now shows a friendly **"No microphone found"** message instead of failing silently.
- **The pop-up overlay behaves.** It now appears on the correct screen in multi-monitor setups on both Windows and Linux.
- **A data-safety fix on Windows.** Certain installs no longer wipe your settings on every update.

### 🪶 Lighter on your computer

- Handy can now **free up memory when you're not using it**, dropping idle usage from over a gigabyte to a tiny fraction of that. Startup is quicker too.

### 🔒 A privacy fix

- Your cloud AI keys are **no longer written into log files**.

### 🌍 More languages polished

Alongside the three new languages, there was quality polish for **German, Italian, Russian, and Chinese**.

### 🛠️ Behind the scenes

Lots of less-visible work to keep Handy healthy: automated checks are now far faster (from about 30 minutes down to roughly a minute), every change to the main code is now automatically built and testable, core engines and libraries were updated, and there was a big push to make Handy install cleanly on Linux and NixOS. The docs also gained clearer setup guides for Intel Macs, Windows (winget), Homebrew, and Linux troubleshooting.

### 👏 Who built it

Huge thanks to **CJ Pais** (the maintainer, most active by far), **Evgeny Khudoba** (who led the Linux/NixOS packaging push), **Viren Mohindra** (audio and automation), and **Fero** (microphone reliability and safer recordings), along with dozens of other contributors who fixed bugs and added translations.

prs.title: docs: add Intel Mac (x86_64) build instructions
prs.description: Adds BUILD.md instructions for building on Intel (x86_64) Macs, where ONNX Runtime has no prebuilt binaries: install onnxruntime via Homebrew and set the dynamic-linking environment variables.

prs.title: docs: complete Portuguese translation for portable updates
prs.description: Completes the Portuguese translation by filling in the remaining untranslated strings for the portable-update flow.

prs.title: docs: add overlay/pasting issue workaround for Linux to Known Issues
prs.description: Documents a known Linux issue where the recording overlay interferes with pasting transcribed text, along with the simple workaround (disable the overlay, enable audio feedback).

prs.title: refactor(nix): drop redundant LD_LIBRARY_PATH wrapper prefix
prs.description: Drops a redundant library-path wrapper prefix in the Nix packaging; cleanup with no behavior change.

prs.title: docs(agents): make GitHub workflow rules actionable for AI assistants
prs.description: Rewrites the AI-assistant contributor guidance so the GitHub workflow rules are concrete and actionable.

prs.title: refactor(nix): remove phases duplicated from cargo-tauri.hook
prs.description: Removes build phases in the Nix flake that were already provided by the cargo-tauri hook.

prs.title: fix(nix): Fix for macOS build for nixpkgs
prs.description: Fixes the macOS Nix build so Handy can be packaged for nixpkgs.

prs.title: docs(audio): clarify what the mic-init timing log actually measures
prs.description: Adds a code comment clarifying what the microphone-initialization timing log actually measures; documentation only, no behavior change.

prs.title: chore(nix): add bun node_modules normalization scripts
prs.description: Adds scripts to normalize bun node_modules, needed for the upstream nixpkgs packaging effort.

prs.title: refactor(nix): replace manual bindgen env with rustPlatform.bindgenHook
prs.description: Uses the standard bindgen hook instead of manually setting clang include args in the Nix build.

prs.title: fix: improve German translation quality
prs.description: Improves the quality of the German translation.

prs.title: feat: add AWS Bedrock (Mantle) as post-processing provider
prs.description: Adds Amazon Bedrock as a cloud provider option for AI post-processing of transcripts.

prs.title: docs: unify CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md
prs.description: Merges the two AI-agent instruction files (CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md) into a single source to remove duplication.

prs.title: fix(overlay): parse HANDY_NO_GTK_LAYER_SHELL as boolean
prs.description: Makes the Linux overlay environment toggle parse as a proper boolean, following up on the GTK layer-shell fix.

prs.title: query gpu async
prs.description: Makes the GPU capability query for whisper.cpp run asynchronously so it no longer blocks the app while starting up.

prs.title: docs(readme): add Linux startup troubleshooting section
prs.description: Adds a Linux startup-troubleshooting section to the README, including the environment toggle for the overlay.

prs.title: Fix (linux) overlay problem in kde
prs.description: Fixes the recording overlay on Linux/KDE by adding an environment toggle to disable GTK layer-shell when it misbehaves.

prs.title: perf: add reasoning_effort passthrough to avoid thinking-mode latency in local models
prs.description: Lets users pass a reasoning-effort setting to local post-processing models so they skip slow 'thinking' mode and respond faster.

prs.title: nix: set ALSA_PLUGIN_DIR via symlinkJoin
prs.description: Fixes an audio error on non-NixOS home-manager setups by presenting the ALSA plugins through a single joined directory.

prs.title: fix crash on old cpus
prs.description: Fixes a crash on older CPUs that lack certain CPU instruction sets.

prs.title: Update Italian translation
prs.description: Updates the Italian translation.

prs.title: add cohere
prs.description: Adds Cohere as a cloud provider for AI post-processing of transcripts.

prs.title: fix(nix): remove onnxruntime overlay, use nixpkgs native package
prs.description: Switches the Nix build to nixpkgs' native onnxruntime package instead of a custom overlay.

prs.title: Preserve legacy portable installs during updates
prs.description: Preserves portable-mode installs that use the old empty marker file when the updater runs, so legacy portable setups aren't lost on update.

prs.title: upgrade transcribe rs to 0.3.5
prs.description: Upgrades the transcribe-rs engine to 0.3.5, which adds 250ms of start padding that improves Parakeet int8 transcription accuracy.

prs.title: Load the VAD in parallel to ASR model
prs.description: Loads the voice-activity-detection model in parallel with the speech model to speed up startup.

prs.title: fix(tray): set tray tooltip text on Windows
prs.description: Sets the Windows tray-icon hover tooltip, which was previously empty.

prs.title: docs: add manual release signature verification steps
prs.description: Documents how to manually verify downloaded release signatures with minisign.

prs.title: fix: don't log cloud provider keys
prs.description: Stops cloud-provider API keys from being written into log files (a privacy fix).

prs.title: docs: add feature freeze notice to CONTRIBUTING.md and fix typo
prs.description: Adds a feature-freeze notice to the contributing guide and fixes a typo.

prs.title: Use a more conservative OpenCC conversion for zh-Hant transcription
prs.description: Uses a more conservative Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant) text conversion to avoid over-converting characters during transcription.

prs.title: Add Hebrew language support
prs.description: Adds full Hebrew language support, including right-to-left (RTL) layout.

prs.title: rearrange some ui
prs.description: Rearranges the settings UI: moves History above Post-processing and relocates the cancel shortcut when push-to-talk is disabled.

prs.title: enumerate and list gpus in the whisper dropdown, improve auto gpu
prs.description: Lists the available GPUs in the Whisper model dropdown and improves automatic GPU selection.

prs.title: fix: require magic string in portable marker to prevent false portable mode on scoop installs
prs.description: Requires a magic string in the portable marker so Scoop installs no longer falsely trigger portable mode (which wiped data on every update).

prs.title: Add Bulgarian language
prs.description: Adds Bulgarian language support.

prs.title: [BUGFIX] Fix model speed/accuracy indicator alignment
prs.description: Fixes the alignment of the model speed/accuracy indicator in the UI.

prs.title: fix: show friendly error when no audio input device is available
prs.description: Shows a clear 'No Microphone Found' message instead of failing silently when no audio input device is available, with translations for all locales.

prs.title: Adding Swedish language translation
prs.description: Adds Swedish language support.

prs.title: Save recordings before transcription
prs.description: Saves each recording to disk before transcription so audio is never lost if transcription fails, and keeps failed/pending entries in History so they can be retried.

prs.title: Remove outdated CHANGELOG.md
prs.description: Removes the stale CHANGELOG.md (unmaintained since v0.3.0); GitHub Releases are now the source of truth for release notes.

prs.title: fix: sha256 verification to prevent corrupt partial download loop
prs.description: Adds SHA-256 verification so corrupt partial downloads no longer get stuck in an infinite resume loop that trapped users.

prs.title: improve history performance
prs.description: Improves History performance by paginating the scroll.

prs.title: Update Raycast integration description
prs.description: Updates the README's Raycast integration note to mention the new language-switch feature in the extension.

prs.title: docs: add Raycast extension to Integrations section
prs.description: Adds an Integrations section to the README that mentions the Raycast extension for Handy.

prs.title: fix(ci): use sign-binaries: true in main-build.yml
prs.description: Fixes failing main-branch builds by enabling binary signing in the main build workflow.

prs.title: whisper-rs 0.16.0 and ort.rc12
prs.description: Upgrades whisper-rs to 0.16.0 and ONNX Runtime to rc12.

prs.title: fix(ci): grant contents: write in main-build.yml
prs.description: Grants the main build workflow the write permission it needs to avoid a startup failure.

prs.title: ci: run full build and quality checks on push to main
prs.description: Adds CI that runs the full build and quality checks on every push to main, so any main commit is downloadable and testable.

prs.title: feat(audio): lazy stream close for bluetooth mic latency
prs.description: Adds an experimental option that keeps the microphone open for 30 seconds after recording to cut latency for back-to-back dictation, which especially helps Bluetooth mics.

prs.title: fix: prevent idle watcher from unloading model during recording
prs.description: Stops the idle timer from unloading the transcription model in the middle of a recording.

prs.title: feat(audio): use device default sample rate and always downsample
prs.description: Opens the microphone at its native sample rate and always downsamples to 16kHz, improving compatibility across devices.

prs.title: upgrade path from old giga-am to new
prs.description: Adds an upgrade path that migrates users from the old GigaAM model to the new one.

prs.title: add extra recording buffer
prs.description: Adds an extra recording buffer so the start and end of speech aren't clipped.

prs.title: Update Italian translation
prs.description: Updates the Italian translation, renaming 'unload' to 'release' to avoid confusion with 'download'.

prs.title: ci: reduce PR check time from ~30 min to ~1 min
prs.description: Cuts PR check time from about 30 minutes to about 1 minute by trimming redundant workflow runs.

prs.title: fix: auto-unload model after idle timeout to reduce memory
prs.description: Automatically unloads the transcription model after an idle timeout, dropping idle memory from about 1.1GB to about 80MB.

prs.title: feat(nix): NixOS integration — ALSA_PLUGIN_DIR + nixosModule
prs.description: Makes Handy work out-of-the-box on NixOS by fixing silent audio under PipeWire and adding a NixOS module.

prs.title: experimental: pick between cpu/gpu acceleration + enable directml on windows
prs.description: Adds an experimental setting to choose between CPU and GPU acceleration and enables DirectML acceleration on Windows.

prs.title: Migrate to transcribe-rs-0.3.1 and add Canary support
prs.description: Migrates to the transcribe-rs 0.3.x API and adds support for NVIDIA's Canary 1B v2 transcription model.

prs.title: ensure samples don't get dropped
prs.description: Fixes audio samples being dropped during recording.

prs.title: fix: keep Windows microphone guidance Windows-only
prs.description: Ensures Windows-specific microphone guidance only appears on Windows.

prs.title: Add Windows installation with winget to README
prs.description: Adds winget installation instructions for Windows to the README.

prs.title: Reduce `VolumeSlider` step size from 10% to 1%
prs.description: Makes the volume slider adjustable in 1% steps instead of 10% for finer control.

prs.title: upgrade to handy-keys 0.2.3
prs.description: Upgrades the handy-keys input dependency to 0.2.3.

prs.title: be able to change models from the tray
prs.description: Lets you switch transcription models directly from the tray menu.

prs.title: attempt to clean up warnings on build
prs.description: Cleans up compiler warnings during the build.

prs.title: Using the whisper `initial_prompt` field for custom words
prs.description: Feeds the user's custom-words list into Whisper's initial-prompt so the model prefers those spellings during transcription.

prs.title: Add Windows microphone permission onboarding
prs.description: Adds a Windows onboarding flow that detects blocked microphone access and routes users to the permission settings.

prs.title: unwind instead of crash
prs.description: Makes the app unwind cleanly instead of hard-crashing on certain panics.

prs.title: default to handy keys on windows
prs.description: Makes the handy-keys input backend the default on Windows.

prs.title: fix(nix): replace manual hash management with bun2nix
prs.description: Replaces manual dependency-hash management in the Nix build with bun2nix for reproducible builds.

prs.title: docs: add note in readme about homebrew install
prs.description: Adds a README note about Homebrew cask installation and maintenance.

prs.title: fix(nix): Fixed nix hash for dependencies, added CI job and script for updating dependencies versions
prs.description: Fixes the Nix dependency hashes and adds a CI job and script to keep them updated.

prs.title: fix: overlay not showing on non-primary monitors
prs.description: Fixes the recording overlay not showing on non-primary (secondary) monitors.

prs.title: Add model loading failure notifications with i18n support
prs.description: Adds translated notifications when a transcription model fails to load.

prs.title: ui: improve scrollbar UI with custom colors and rounded thumb
prs.description: Improves the scrollbar styling with custom colors and a rounded thumb.

prs.title: Improve Russian translation
prs.description: Reviews and improves the Russian translation across the UI.

prs.title: Handle microphone init failure without aborting
prs.description: Prevents a hard crash when microphone initialization fails (for example when Windows privacy blocks mic access), propagating an error instead.

prs.title: fix(ci): simplify Bun setup for Windows ARM64
prs.description: Simplifies the Bun setup for Windows ARM64 builds in CI.

prs.title: feat: language-aware filler word removal
prs.description: Removes filler words like 'um' and 'eh' based on the UI language (preserving real words in languages where they aren't fillers), with a custom-override setting.

prs.title: Fix Italian translation
prs.description: Fixes the Italian translation for the recording-retention settings and tidies styling and consistency.

prs.title: feat: add portable mode to NSIS installer
prs.description: Adds a portable-mode option to the Windows installer that keeps all of Handy's data in a single folder.

prs.title: Update translation.json
prs.description: Updates translation strings.

prs.title: docs: add Linux install steps and AppImage troubleshooting
prs.description: Adds Linux install steps and AppImage troubleshooting (including a deb-bundle workaround for rolling-release distros) to the build docs.
